date.description: Date for the period requested expressed in YYYY-MM-DD format.

fsymId.description: FactSet Entity Identifier. Six alpha-numeric characters, excluding vowels, with a -E suffix (XXXXXX-E).

requestId.description: Identifier that was used for the request.

scoreType.description: The name of the specific SASB Score type being shown in the response. This will be represented by the scoreTypes input: PULSE, INSIGHT, MOMENTUM, ART_VOL_TTM, CAT_VOL_TTM, or DYNAMIC_MAT.

accessAndAffordability.description: The Access and Affordability SASB Category.

allCategories.description: The All Categories Category. This represents the overall SASB Score for the given 'scoreType'. When scoreType = ESG_RANK, the data type will be string, otherwise data type will be a number with double format.

criticalIncidentRiskManagement.description: The Critical Incident Risk Management Category.

employeeEngagementDiversityandInclusion.description: The Employee Engagement Diversity and Inclusion Category.

employeeHealthAndSafety.description: The Employee Health And Safety Category.

humanRightsandCommunityRelations.description: The Human Rights and Community Relations Category.

managementOfTheLegalAndRegulatoryEnviron.description: The Management of the Legal and Regulatory Environment Category.

materialsSourcingAndEfficiency.description: The Materials Sourcing and Efficiency Category.

materiality.description: The Materiality Category. When scoreType = ESG_RANK, the data type will be string, otherwise data type will be a number with double format.

physicalImpactsOfClimateChange.description: The Physical Impacts of Climate Change Category.

productQualityAndSafety.description: The Product Quality and Safety Category.

productDesignAndLifecycleManagement.description: The Product Design And Lifecycle Management Category.

sellingPracticesAndProductLabeling.description: The Selling Practices And Product Labeling Category.

wasteAndHazardousMaterialsManagement.description: The Waste and Hazardous Materials Management Category.

waterAndWastewaterManagement.description: The Water and Wastewater Management Category.
